title: Sinteză de politici - Prezentare generală
subtitle: Martie 2020
description: A policy brief presenting the main messages and recommendations of the EU-funded SALSA project on the role of small farms and agri-food businesses in sustainable food and nutrition security. It highlights the contributions of small farms in 30 regions across Europe and Africa and outlines tailored policy interventions to improve access to value-adding markets, cooperatives, finance, land, advisory services, and climate adaptation.
